headline: The ‘G-Wagen of golf carts’ could be the ideal second car
summary: Lisbon startup Amble launches a unique electric buggy. Dubbed the 'G-Wagen of golf carts,' it skips high speed and self-driving. Aims to be an ideal second car, not a performance EV.

headline: ABC tells the government to get out of its newsrooms
summary: ABC fires back at the FCC over an investigation into The View's political coverage. The network asserts the probe threatens editorial independence. ABC claims the FCC is targeting programs perceived as 'unfriendly' to the current administration.

headline: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
summary: Anthropic is expanding its Claude Cowork AI platform. The platform will now be accessible on mobile and web browsers. Max subscribers get first access, with wider rollout planned soon.

headline: Google announces Pixel 11 launch event in August
summary: Google announced its next 'Made by Google' Pixel launch event. The Pixel 11 hardware reveal is set for August 12th in New York City. The evening event, starting 6 PM ET, was teased with an animation.

headline: Save 36% Off the TP-Link Deco 7 Pro BE10000 Wi-Fi 7 Whole Home Mesh System
summary: Massive 36% discount available on the TP-Link Deco 7 Pro BE10000. This whole home mesh system features cutting-edge Wi-Fi 7 technology. It includes four 2.5Gb ethernet ports for blazing-fast wired connections.

headline: Upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 Games: Release Dates for 2026 and Beyond
summary: A new list details upcoming games for the Nintendo Switch 2. Information covers titles expected for 2026 and beyond. The report focuses on building the console's future game library.

headline: Today’s Best Deals: Crimson Desert for PS5, Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, and 4K Steelbooks
summary: Top deals today include Crimson Desert for PS5 and Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro. Find discounts on exclusive 4K Steelbooks for movie collectors. Also featured are deals on MTG x Marvel, Anker chargers, and a mini fight pad.

headline: Christopher Nolan's The Prestige Is Returning to Theaters
summary: Christopher Nolan's acclaimed film, The Prestige, is set for a theatrical return. Often considered one of Nolan's most underappreciated works. Fans will soon have another chance to experience the magic on the big screen.

headline: Chris Mason: Farage attempts to seize back the agenda after finance row
summary: Nigel Farage is actively trying to regain control of the political narrative. This follows a recent controversy regarding his personal finances. Farage aims to frame the upcoming by-election as 'the people versus the establishment.'

headline: Harry loses High Court privacy case against Daily Mail publisher
summary: Prince Harry has lost his High Court privacy case. The case was brought against the publisher of the Daily Mail. The judge ruled that the claimants failed to prove their allegations.

headline: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears ankle tag
summary: Marine Le Pen has been found guilty in a recent court case. Despite the conviction, she can still run for president. Her presidential bid is contingent on wearing an electronic ankle tag.

headline: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
summary: The woman suspected in a Monaco bomb attack has been found dead. Anastasiia Berezovska was discovered in Ukraine. She was wanted in connection with an explosion that injured a Ukrainian millionaire.
